description.text: The family room is quiet now, breakfast cleared away. The museum door stands open to the east; through the west door, the forest path is waiting.

Your parents are both at the breakfast table, which never happens, sitting very straight, which happens even less. There is a wrapped bundle beside the teapot and a look on your mother's face that means a Speech has been prepared.

options.text: Join your parents at the table
Step out onto the forest path
Go back up to your room
